description: Special interest: astronomy and dark sky tourism
query: I am a solo traveller flying from Hamburg to La Palma in the Canary Islands from November 12th to 19th, 2026. My budget is €2,000. I am passionate about astronomy and stargazing — I specifically want to stay near the Roque de los Muchachos observatory. Please suggest accommodation in a dark sky area, stargazing tours, and hiking options.

hard_constraints.accommodation: rural house or small hotel near observatory
hard_constraints.interests: stargazing, astronomy, dark sky reserves, observatory visits, hiking

travelplan.title: La Palma Dark Sky Astronomy Trip — Hamburg to La Palma, 12–19 Nov 2026

days.label: Arrival: Hamburg to La Palma, transfer to Garafía

slots.name: Flight day: Hamburg (HAM) to La Palma (SPC)
slots.description: Round-trip flight search returned no selectable carrier/timetable yet for Nov 2026, but Google Flights price insight shows a typical HAM–SPC return range of about €310–€750. Hold this as the travel window and verify/book when schedules open.
slots.location: Hamburg Airport to La Palma Airport
slots.notes: Exact flight numbers/times were unavailable from the live provider; do not treat these times as booked flight times.

slots.name: Pick up rental car at La Palma Airport
slots.description: Pick up a compact/economy rental car at SPC. A car is strongly recommended because no public bus reaches Roque de los Muchachos or Garafía highland viewpoints reliably at night.
slots.notes: Estimated €25–€30/day for 7 days plus taxes/insurance buffer. Choose full insurance and a car comfortable on steep mountain roads.

slots.name: Drive SPC to Garafía / Roque Faro accommodation
slots.description: Drive from La Palma Airport to the north-west dark-sky area near Roque Faro, Garafía. Routing API was unavailable, but web research indicates the airport-to-northwest mountain transfer is roughly 1.5–2 hours depending on road conditions.
slots.location: La Palma Airport to Roque Faro, Garafía
slots.notes: Avoid rushing: roads are steep and winding. If arriving after dark, plan extra time.

slots.name: Check in: Pension Roque Faro / dark-sky Garafía lodging
slots.description: Base yourself in Roque Faro/Garafía, one of the closest rural areas to Roque de los Muchachos, with low light pollution and shorter night-drive distance to observing spots.
slots.location: Pension Roque Faro, Calle Roque Faro, 38788 Garafía, La Palma
slots.notes: Estimated €65/night × 7. Confirm exact check-in; if Pension Roque Faro is unavailable, use Dark Sky Hosting rural properties in Garafía/Puntagorda.

slots.name: Late simple dinner / self-catered supplies
slots.description: Keep dinner simple after the mountain drive: groceries, guesthouse meal, or a light stop en route, since several Garafía restaurants close early.
slots.notes: Stock breakfast/snacks for hiking and late stargazing nights.

days.label: Garafía orientation and first guided stargazing

slots.name: Breakfast at lodging
slots.description: Slow breakfast and weather check before local orientation.
slots.notes: Check LP-4 road status and cloud/wind forecast before any summit plans.

slots.name: Garafía / Puntagorda orientation and supplies
slots.description: Easy first-morning drive around the north-west villages to get groceries, water, red-light torch batteries, and hiking snacks while acclimating to the roads.
slots.notes: Keep white light use minimal near observing areas.

slots.name: Lunch: Restaurante Jardin De Los Naranjos
slots.description: Canarian/Spanish lunch in Puntagorda; moderate budget and open Friday lunch/evening according to Google Places result.
slots.notes: Good practical base meal before the first stargazing night.

slots.name: Rest and astronomy preparation
slots.description: Charge camera/phone, prepare warm layers, red headlamp, thermos, and snacks. Summit and high viewpoints can be 0–5°C at night in November.
slots.notes: Avoid alcohol before mountain night driving.

slots.name: Early dinner: Restaurante El Bernegal
slots.description: Traditional Canarian dinner option in Santo Domingo, Garafía. Verified as highly rated, but note it often closes around 17:00 in search results; use this slot as early dinner/late lunch or switch to self-catering if hours change.
slots.location: C. Díaz y Suárez, 5, 38787 Santo Domingo, Garafía
slots.notes: Call/check same week because rural hours vary.

slots.name: Guided deep-sky observation with StArt La Palma
slots.description: Small-group professional stargazing with resident guides and telescope observation of deep-sky objects from a dark viewpoint such as Llano del Jable/Mendo, timed for La Palma’s trade-wind inversion conditions.
slots.location: StArt La Palma / dark-sky viewpoint, La Palma
slots.notes: Book ahead; bring winter layers, red light only, and confirm meeting point after weather check.

days.label: GR-131 high-ridge hiking and independent dark-sky session

slots.name: Breakfast and pack hiking kit
slots.description: Prepare water, sun protection, wind layer, snacks, offline maps, and warm summit clothing.
slots.notes: GR-131 ridge is exposed; do not hike in high wind, fog, ice, or storm warnings.

slots.name: Drive to Roque de los Muchachos trailhead
slots.description: Mountain drive from Garafía/Roque Faro to the Roque de los Muchachos area. Web research suggests Roque Faro is around 25–30 minutes from the observatory visitor area; allow extra time for parking and slow roads.
slots.location: Roque Faro to Roque de los Muchachos
slots.notes: Routing API unavailable due missing Maps key; timing based on web search.

slots.name: Hike GR-131 ridge: Roque de los Muchachos section
slots.description: Out-and-back high-altitude hike on the GR-131 caldera rim near Roque de los Muchachos. Free trail access; dramatic crater views and volcanic ridge terrain. Turn around early if weather deteriorates.
slots.location: GR-131, Roque de los Muchachos, La Palma
slots.notes: Solo hiker safety: download maps, tell lodging your plan, carry 2L+ water, avoid exposed ridge in strong wind.

slots.name: Return drive and recovery rest
slots.description: Drive back to the accommodation and rest after high-altitude hiking.
slots.location: Roque de los Muchachos to Roque Faro
slots.notes: Hydrate and check weather again before any night observing.

slots.name: Dinner: Ristorante Ancora, Puntagorda
slots.description: Moderate-budget dinner in Puntagorda; verified open Saturday afternoon/evening in Google Places result.
slots.notes: Not Canarian-focused, but useful reliable Saturday evening option in the dark-sky north-west.

slots.name: Picnic lunch at viewpoint
slots.description: Packed lunch after the ridge hike to avoid relying on summit food options.
slots.location: Roque de los Muchachos viewpoint area
slots.notes: Pack out all rubbish.

slots.name: Independent stargazing near accommodation
slots.description: Short independent observing session from a safe dark area near the lodging, prioritizing recovery after the ridge hike. Use red light only and avoid driving if tired.
slots.notes: Best if skies are clear and wind is manageable; otherwise use as rest night.

days.label: Roque de los Muchachos Visitor Centre and observatory landscape

slots.name: Pre-booked Roque de los Muchachos Observatory visit
slots.description: Morning guided observatory/telescope visit. Interior access is only by advance reservation; telescope assignment is operational and cannot be guaranteed, though GTC is commonly featured by providers.
slots.location: Observatorio Roque de los Muchachos, Garafía
slots.notes: Subject to weather/technical cancellation; bring ID, closed shoes, jacket, and water.

slots.name: Rest and sunset at a safe viewpoint
slots.description: Easy late afternoon: rest, then choose a nearby safe viewpoint for sunset if winds are calm. This keeps the day lighter after the observatory morning.
slots.notes: Do not park or use lights near active telescope areas after dark.

slots.name: Dinner: Restaurante Jardin De Los Naranjos
slots.description: Dinner in Puntagorda; verified Sunday opening window in Google Places search.
slots.notes: Good fallback if El Bernegal closes early.

slots.name: Short Milky Way / deep-sky check near lodging
slots.description: Optional independent observing close to the accommodation after the observatory-focused day. Keep it short to avoid fatigue.
slots.notes: Only if skies are clear and you are rested.

slots.name: Roque de los Muchachos Visitor Centre
slots.description: Visit the official visitor centre for exhibits on La Palma’s Sky Law, atmospheric conditions, and the island’s role in professional astronomy. Winter hours are typically around 10:00–16:00.
slots.location: Centro de Visitantes Roque de los Muchachos, LP-4 km 32, Garafía
slots.notes: Good indoor option if ridge winds are strong.

slots.name: Breakfast at lodging
slots.description: Early breakfast before the observatory visit; bring warm layers for the 2,300m altitude.
slots.notes: Check road status before departure.

slots.name: Lunch: Restaurante El Bernegal
slots.description: Traditional Canarian lunch in Santo Domingo, Garafía; search result shows Sunday lunch hours.
slots.location: C. Díaz y Suárez, 5, 38787 Santo Domingo, Garafía
slots.notes: Confirm hours before going.

slots.name: Drive to Roque de los Muchachos Observatory
slots.description: Allow a generous mountain-driving buffer to reach the observatory gate/visitor area. No public transport reaches the summit, so the rental car is essential.
slots.location: Roque Faro to Observatorio Roque de los Muchachos
slots.notes: Arrive early; tours are morning-only and pre-booked.

slots.name: Breakfast and Caldera hiking safety check
slots.description: Early breakfast, pack 2L+ water, lunch, rain shell, sun protection, and offline maps for Caldera de Taburiente.
slots.notes: Avoid Barranco de las Angustias during/after heavy rain due flash-flood risk.

slots.name: Drive to Caldera de Taburiente access area
slots.description: Drive from Garafía/Roque Faro toward the Caldera de Taburiente access side near Los Llanos / Barranco de las Angustias. Routing API was unavailable; allow generous mountain-road time.
slots.location: Garafía to Los Llanos / Caldera de Taburiente
slots.notes: If using Los Brecitos shuttle/taxi, confirm pickup in advance.

slots.name: Guided or self-guided Caldera de Taburiente hike
slots.description: Hike the classic Caldera/Barranco de las Angustias landscape, focusing on marked routes, Dos Aguas and the Cascada de Colores detour only if conditions are safe. Senderismo La Palma is a highly rated hiking operator if you prefer a guide.
slots.location: Caldera de Taburiente National Park / Barranco de las Angustias
slots.notes: Permits are mainly for camping or restricted parking; daylight hiking is free, but parking/shuttle logistics must be checked.

slots.name: Packed trail lunch
slots.description: Packed lunch after the main hike or at a safe rest point depending on route timing.
slots.location: Caldera de Taburiente / Los Llanos area
slots.notes: Do not rely on food availability inside the park.

slots.name: Drive back via Los Llanos / west coast
slots.description: Return drive from the Caldera side to Garafía, with a rest stop if needed.
slots.location: Los Llanos to Roque Faro / Garafía
slots.notes: Do not combine a long hike with late-night summit driving if fatigued.

slots.name: Dinner: Kiosco 7, Los Llanos de Aridane
slots.description: Early Canarian/Spanish dinner in Los Llanos; search result shows Monday 13:00–20:00 opening. Useful before returning fully to the rural north-west.
slots.notes: If you return to Garafía earlier, swap for self-catering.

slots.name: Recovery night / weather buffer for stars
slots.description: Low-effort sky check near lodging only if energy and weather allow; otherwise keep this as a recovery evening after the Caldera hike.
slots.notes: Safety priority after a long hiking day.

days.label: Llano del Jable astronomical viewpoint night

slots.name: Puntagorda market area / rural dark-sky downtime
slots.description: Light local day in Puntagorda/Garafía rather than a strenuous hike, preserving energy for nighttime observing.
slots.notes: Use this time to recharge camera batteries and review star charts.

slots.name: Lunch: Jardin De Los Naranjos or self-catered alternative
slots.description: Tuesday may be difficult for rural restaurants; if Jardin De Los Naranjos is closed, use groceries/self-catering in Puntagorda.
slots.notes: The listed restaurant may be closed on Tuesday; this is a planned fallback meal budget.

slots.name: Late breakfast after hiking recovery
slots.description: Easy morning after the Caldera day and before an evening observing session.
slots.notes: Check moonrise, cloud, and wind forecasts.

slots.name: Drive toward Llano del Jable astronomical viewpoint
slots.description: Drive from the north-west toward Mirador Astronómico del Llano del Jable. Leave before dark to avoid navigating unfamiliar volcanic roads at night.
slots.location: Garafía/Puntagorda to Mirador Astronómico del Llano del Jable
slots.notes: Routing API unavailable; build a conservative time buffer.

slots.name: Early dinner/picnic before observing
slots.description: Portable dinner before observing; avoids needing restaurants after the nighttime session.
slots.location: Near Llano del Jable / El Paso area
slots.notes: Bring hot drink and extra layers.

slots.name: Llano del Jable dark-sky observing session
slots.description: Evening at Mirador Astronómico del Llano del Jable, a 24-hour astronomical viewpoint and popular dark-sky gathering place. Watch clouds below the inversion and observe with binoculars/camera or meet amateur astronomers if present.
slots.location: Mirador Astronómico del Llano del Jable, LP-301, El Paso
slots.notes: Use red lights only. Stay in designated areas and drive back only if alert; otherwise consider a west-side hotel fallback.

days.label: Flexible weather buffer and Garafía local day

slots.name: Breakfast and weather decision point
slots.description: Use the final full day as a flexible buffer: if a previous stargazing or observatory plan was clouded/windy, move it here.
slots.notes: Mid-November is often good above the inversion, but wind/road closures remain possible.

slots.name: Short local hike: Puntagorda/Garafía pine and viewpoint trail
slots.description: Gentler local walk in the dark-sky north-west rather than another long mountain day. Keep it flexible for weather and road conditions.
slots.notes: Choose a marked local trail and avoid exposed ridge paths in strong wind.

slots.name: Lunch: Restaurante Jardin De Los Naranjos
slots.description: Wednesday lunch in Puntagorda; verified opening window in restaurant search.
slots.notes: Confirm hours during the trip.

slots.name: Dinner: El Bernegal or self-catered fallback
slots.description: Early final Canarian dinner in Garafía if open; otherwise use self-catering because many rural restaurants close early.
slots.notes: Search results show El Bernegal Wednesday 12:00–17:00, so treat this as an early-meal/fallback budget.

slots.name: Final dark-sky buffer session near Roque de los Muchachos
slots.description: Final observing window. If roads and conditions are excellent, use a designated viewpoint on/near LP-4; otherwise observe close to the accommodation to avoid risky night driving before departure.
slots.location: Garafía / Roque de los Muchachos designated viewpoints
slots.notes: Red light only; never enter restricted observatory areas at night.

slots.name: Pack, rest, and astrophotography review
slots.description: Back up photos, pack most luggage, and rest before the final night-sky opportunity.
slots.notes: Keep warm layers accessible for the night.

days.label: Departure: Garafía to SPC, fly to Hamburg

slots.name: Breakfast and check out
slots.description: Final breakfast, room check, and checkout from the Garafía dark-sky base.
slots.notes: Check flight status before leaving the north-west.

slots.name: Drive Garafía to Santa Cruz / airport side
slots.description: Conservative transfer from Garafía/Roque Faro to the east side of the island and La Palma Airport area. Leave extra time for winding roads and fuel return.
slots.location: Roque Faro, Garafía to Santa Cruz de La Palma / SPC
slots.notes: Routing API unavailable; airport transfer estimated from web-based island driving times.

slots.name: Lunch: El Cafe de Don Manuel, Santa Cruz
slots.description: Cafe lunch in Santa Cruz de La Palma before airport check-in; verified daily daytime opening.
slots.location: C. Anselmo Pérez de Brito, 2, 38700 Santa Cruz de la Palma
slots.notes: Allows a buffer before return flight.

slots.name: Flight day: La Palma (SPC) to Hamburg (HAM)
slots.description: Return flight window to Hamburg. Exact airline/times unavailable from live flight tool for the 2026 date; verify via the Google Flights link when schedules are released.
slots.location: La Palma Airport to Hamburg Airport
slots.notes: Outbound and inbound estimated cost is included in the Day 1 flight slot.

slots.name: Return rental car and airport check-in
slots.description: Refuel, return the rental car at SPC, and check in for the return flight.
slots.notes: Adjust once actual flight time is booked.

validation_feedback: The itinerary successfully meets all user constraints and tasks. You are staying in Garafía (Roque Faro), which is a premier dark-sky area near the Roque de los Muchachos observatory. The plan includes a guided observatory visit, professional stargazing tours, and high-altitude hiking (GR-131 and Caldera de Taburiente). The budget of €1,665 is well within the €2,000 limit, and the logistics account for the necessary rental car and mountain driving times. All tasks, including weather research and restaurant sourcing in remote areas, have been addressed.

task_list.name: flight_hamburg_to_la_palma
task_list.text: Find round-trip flights from Hamburg (HAM) to La Palma (SPC) for one adult from November 12th to 19th, 2026, within the total budget of €2,000.

task_list.name: hotel_near_observatory
task_list.text: Search for solo traveler accommodation near Roque de los Muchachos or in Garafía/Puntagorda (dark sky areas) for Nov 12-19, 2026.

task_list.name: stargazing_tours_la_palma
task_list.text: Identify professional stargazing tours and astronomical experiences available on La Palma.

task_list.name: hiking_routes_la_palma
task_list.text: Identify specific hiking trails near Roque de los Muchachos and the Caldera de Taburiente suitable for a solo hiker.
task_list.validation_comment: task text does not clearly match its task type

task_list.name: observatory_visit_availability
task_list.text: Check the visiting hours and booking requirements for the Roque de los Muchachos Observatory (ORM) for November 2026.

task_list.name: routing_check_transport
task_list.text: Verify travel time and transport feasibility (car rental vs taxi) between La Palma airport and the high-altitude accommodation near the observatory.

task_list.name: restaurant_local_options
task_list.text: Find local restaurants or dining options in the northern/high-altitude regions of La Palma near the accommodation.

task_list.name: weather_and_visibility_check
task_list.text: Research typical weather conditions and stargazing visibility on La Palma in mid-November.
